text:

Author: tobik

Log:
  games/alex4: Prepare for Allegro 4.4.3

  Allegro 4.4.3 removed aliases for fsin, fcos, etc.  They are also
  available as fixsin, fixcos, etc., so use them instead.

  PR:		235477

  head/games/alex4/files/patch-shooter.c
